summary: Milestones Tab | Hearing Announcement to the Last Inning
description:
GIVEN the user is in the Inning Navigation section
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates to the last inning in the milestones section
steps.result:
THEN the user will hear: "Viewing <insert inning displayed> inning, press left arrow key to view milestones in the previous inning”
For example: "Viewing the 9th inning, press left arrow key to view milestones in the previous inning"
